mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cf_account (id, user_id, account_book_id, asset_account_id, category_id, type, amount, remark, image_url, location, happened_at, tags, is_reimbursed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{accountBookId}, #{assetAccountId}, #{categoryId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{imageUrl}, #{location}, #{happenedAt}, #{tags}, #{isReimbursed}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(happened_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'INCOME' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expense FROM cf_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND happened_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(happened_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT * FROM cf_account WHERE remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pattern}, '%') ORDER BY happened_at DESC
